scope: Finish the OpenAI provider surface for Responses API requests, chat-completions fallback, streaming, and tool calls

rows.source: Responses API request and endpoint client anchors
requiredBehaviors: send OpenAI Responses API requests to /responses by default
serialize user, assistant, tool, image, and audio history into Responses input items
carry system messages and option-level system prompts into instructions
forward structured output, reasoning, verbosity, service tier, prompt cache key, store, and max output token options
route request-scoped model overrides into the request body and fallback metadata
edgeCases: empty input creates a user text item
orphan tool outputs are dropped before request serialization
stored assistant tool calls replay as function_call items
opaque audio references degrade to text placeholders

rows.source: Responses SSE parser and event taxonomy anchors
requiredBehaviors: stream response.output_text.delta through StreamProgressCallback
emit completed function_call output items as LLMToolCall chunks
parse response.completed payloads into final LLMResponse content, tool calls, usage, and request metrics
preserve partial stream output instead of triggering provider fallback after content has streamed
reject malformed completed function_call JSON instead of silently dropping executable tool calls
edgeCases: function_call call_id differs from item id

requiredBehaviors: route useResponsesApi=false calls to /chat/completions
serialize history into chat-completions messages with one leading system message
use max_completion_tokens for remote OpenAI chat-completions models and max_tokens for local compatible endpoints
stream chat-completions deltas without buffering the full reply
accumulate streamed tool_calls fragments into completed LLMToolCall entries
reject malformed completed streamed tool_call JSON
edgeCases: truncated tool calls with finish_reason length
cached and reasoning token usage details

requiredBehaviors: resolve API-key, optional bearer, no-auth, Google API key, and OAuth auth strategies
refresh OAuth credentials once after a 401 and hard-fail exhausted OAuth sessions until re-authentication
classify OpenAI-compatible HTTP and stream failures into typed LLM errors
trigger provider fallback on retryable overloads before first streamed output
avoid provider fallback after partial streamed content or tool output has appeared
edgeCases: response.failed overload before and after partial output

rows.source: AgenC provider factory and structured-output capability gates
requiredBehaviors: createProvider('openai') returns the OpenAI provider with configured model, base URL, and auth state
rebuild provider factory options without requiring OPENAI_API_KEY for OAuth runtime config
allow OpenAI structured outputs through Responses text.format
allow OpenAI-compatible chat-completions structured output through response_format
edgeCases: known old OpenAI models without structured output support
structured output with strict schema normalization
commands: npm run test --workspace=@tetsuo-ai/runtime -- src/llm/provider.test.ts src/llm/provider-capabilities.test.ts src/llm/structured-output.test.ts
